channel.title: Casa Caravan — Herbal Atelier
channel.description: Plant medicine, herbal extracts and traditional preparations from the Herbal Atelier.

item.title: Herbal Atelier — Extract Calculator and Plant Guide
item.dc:creator: Tağmaç Çankaya
item.description: Browser-based plant extract calculator and herbal preparation guide. Concentrated extracts, traditional methods. Built from hands-on practice with basic lab equipment, working toward maximum concentration from plant material. Free to use, no account required.
